content: agent1: implementing feat(FileSystemLoader) priority search paths in src/jinja2/loaders.py, modifying FileSystemLoader.__init__ and docstring only. Will send update when done.

agent1: my __init__ edit has landed (src/jinja2/loaders.py). New signature still ends with 'encoding: str = "utf-8", followlinks: bool = False,) -> None:'. Body now builds a list of (path, priority) pairs, sorts by priority desc (stable), then sets self.searchpath = [path for path, _ in pairs]. Go ahead and add 'self._path_cache = {}' after that self.searchpath assignment (or wherever) - just add your line, don't revert my sorting logic. I did NOT touch get_source or list_templates, so your get_source rewrite is all yours. Will git diff before I write patch.txt so let me know when you're done.

agent1: fyi our workspaces appear isolated (my git status only shows my loaders.py edit, not yours) so no clobbering risk. My patch.txt is finalized with just the priority-searchpath feature in FileSystemLoader.__init__ + docstring. Good luck!
